results.name: build_adl_candidate_set
results.rationale: whole-fn-override:perfect=True from check_reconstruction with only a single binary_over warning (anemone opaque-call worst-case). Init region [0,3) was already accepted; this minimal form binds candidate_root/iter_vec/filter_users_opt/exchange to their HLIL counterparts and matches the binary's view that no local flows to <return> via sret.

regions.note: init region: declares iter_vec, filter_users_opt, candidate_root; binary's anemone treats sret return as opaque so we return a fresh BTreeSet rather than candidate_root to match binary's view that candidate_root does not flow to return.

results.name: compute_user_margin_and_shortfall
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: 78-BB BTreeMap-iteration with margin accumulators; high-level shape captured (account_equity seed -> per-position oracle accumulation -> 4 Option UnitQty result fields). Many flow diffs are anemone opaque-call worst-case warnings.

results.name: compute_position_liquidation_check
results.rationale: Refined sibling-worker baseline: collapsed redundant local rebindings and merged margin-value branch tests; remaining diffs are lymph-vs-anemone extern-call dataflow worst-case, structurally hard to remove without losing HLIL var bindings.
